name: townsquare
description: Embeddable TownSquare slice: self-hostable realtime presence, walking, chat, and a default scene.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/demo.mjs && node --check public/dev-scene.mjs && node --check public/townsquare.mjs && node --check public/walk-sandbox.mjs && for f in public/widget/*.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
